title: Employee Resources
description: Links and resources available to NGA civilians and contractors. Allows for access to resources such as CAC 123, Peoplesoft, Blackboard, and Intelshare.
text:
Official websites use .mil
A .mil website belongs to an official U.S. Department of Defense organization.
Secure .mil websites use HTTPS
A lock (LockA locked padlock) or https:// means you’ve safely connected to the .mil website. Share sensitive information only on official, secure websites.
